steps.t: Guthléod can be found within the trader's outpost west of Elthengels. Ofrith has suggested asking Guthléod about Dagarm's last known whereabouts.
Dagarm was last known to be heading south and east, beyond the river. Guthléod believes that Dagarm may have headed beyond the river and towards known…
Dagarm appears to have been captured by the Uruks in the camp beyond the river. Dagarm wishes to be released from his captivity within the Uruk-hai ca…
Dagarm has returned to the trader's outpost along the road west of Elthengels. You have freed Dagarm, and he has asked you to speak with him upon your…
